Friend, ****

We are almost at the end of the year! With 2021 rapidly approaching we wanted to take a moment to hear what's important to you this coming year.**** [**Take our 2021 priorities survey so Republican governors know what 's important to you!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fRY123jiLh-JdF2yjBfvXgqXi88gMWNrYZQ68V37zQXWOJb9BzSXuYJWUv9AZbl4IBNV2i6mEYgjlbX6SxtjCWSUQnpD_CdO8BFRyzM88Ze6aMrrNl7QID_Zl2IbU_XgAVHvjXwm8-nEUK63FTIMmsPd1q-QBaMxEfRhHm9MbOshf-NNPhoUEepwHKKMoh23mod2WoOyoFlVxnMhJ3UW5FN7M4DR5dnmNHS237L1qEYfZt5xiDs8Dm1rMceyoDhbTuPhrkyKOp4Io6U703CK6rnmAIyMIDOGcH3V2QDDyRaSdBNkAtEnULCHimxX3J4kkzOy5UKNBzjMsyzoMY-HieUvPqICBvbMhOSlOnR5mWE1nbfj31zyl-zn2wya3NArZP4f7f0UbGTSbc7sojhzm8C82k4H7wYft9-E_KbOpN1K7t0UrPdDWYjcZLL3_POcZcOsIQWRDHWCnzUQCAhx0hvfxZtqKe1M3f4wzaOISE-G4aQWXwl2H68GAkqRSNUQ0hnYmFu3C1Yf43Ux039b5kT-06GIApwJFZ520F5IQlH128Yb8vB_4TBwzKr41VIwteDTjygNSWrKgJf-qEJczXH8vNtfYHQv&c=4BSVXx5CalfFvw8oeeGLmYODyYg3VQtJG8WoVu-mfJAm6qFNt9ae-A==&ch=6qPYJ6U4ZDe1mL7rw2Fo3grs2-O8CT7o4mQ6loQrkqJLwlaXDv82DQ==)
With Biden and the Democrats threatening their socialist agenda, we know we're going to have to fight for our rights. From their Green New Deal, to defunding the police, **the dems have radical plans to fundamentally change our country.******

GOP governors are ready to FIGHT FOR YOU. Don't miss this chance to let them know what is important to you in 2021.
[**Take our 2021 priorities survey so Republican governors know what 's important to you!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fRY123jiLh-JdF2yjBfvXgqXi88gMWNrYZQ68V37zQXWOJb9BzSXuYJWUv9AZbl4IBNV2i6mEYgjlbX6SxtjCWSUQnpD_CdO8BFRyzM88Ze6aMrrNl7QID_Zl2IbU_XgAVHvjXwm8-nEUK63FTIMmsPd1q-QBaMxEfRhHm9MbOshf-NNPhoUEepwHKKMoh23mod2WoOyoFlVxnMhJ3UW5FN7M4DR5dnmNHS237L1qEYfZt5xiDs8Dm1rMceyoDhbTuPhrkyKOp4Io6U703CK6rnmAIyMIDOGcH3V2QDDyRaSdBNkAtEnULCHimxX3J4kkzOy5UKNBzjMsyzoMY-HieUvPqICBvbMhOSlOnR5mWE1nbfj31zyl-zn2wya3NArZP4f7f0UbGTSbc7sojhzm8C82k4H7wYft9-E_KbOpN1K7t0UrPdDWYjcZLL3_POcZcOsIQWRDHWCnzUQCAhx0hvfxZtqKe1M3f4wzaOISE-G4aQWXwl2H68GAkqRSNUQ0hnYmFu3C1Yf43Ux039b5kT-06GIApwJFZ520F5IQlH128Yb8vB_4TBwzKr41VIwteDTjygNSWrKgJf-qEJczXH8vNtfYHQv&c=4BSVXx5CalfFvw8oeeGLmYODyYg3VQtJG8WoVu-mfJAm6qFNt9ae-A==&ch=6qPYJ6U4ZDe1mL7rw2Fo3grs2-O8CT7o4mQ6loQrkqJLwlaXDv82DQ==)
Republican governors had huge success in 2020, now it's time to get the job done. Let our GOP governors know what is important for you right now so they can start working for YOU.
[**Take the survey!** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fRY123jiLh-JdF2yjBfvXgqXi88gMWNrYZQ68V37zQXWOJb9BzSXuYJWUv9AZbl4IBNV2i6mEYgjlbX6SxtjCWSUQnpD_CdO8BFRyzM88Ze6aMrrNl7QID_Zl2IbU_XgAVHvjXwm8-nEUK63FTIMmsPd1q-QBaMxEfRhHm9MbOshf-NNPhoUEepwHKKMoh23mod2WoOyoFlVxnMhJ3UW5FN7M4DR5dnmNHS237L1qEYfZt5xiDs8Dm1rMceyoDhbTuPhrkyKOp4Io6U703CK6rnmAIyMIDOGcH3V2QDDyRaSdBNkAtEnULCHimxX3J4kkzOy5UKNBzjMsyzoMY-HieUvPqICBvbMhOSlOnR5mWE1nbfj31zyl-zn2wya3NArZP4f7f0UbGTSbc7sojhzm8C82k4H7wYft9-E_KbOpN1K7t0UrPdDWYjcZLL3_POcZcOsIQWRDHWCnzUQCAhx0hvfxZtqKe1M3f4wzaOISE-G4aQWXwl2H68GAkqRSNUQ0hnYmFu3C1Yf43Ux039b5kT-06GIApwJFZ520F5IQlH128Yb8vB_4TBwzKr41VIwteDTjygNSWrKgJf-qEJczXH8vNtfYHQv&c=4BSVXx5CalfFvw8oeeGLmYODyYg3VQtJG8WoVu-mfJAm6qFNt9ae-A==&ch=6qPYJ6U4ZDe1mL7rw2Fo3grs2-O8CT7o4mQ6loQrkqJLwlaXDv82DQ==)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: In panic mode
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,
Let me be completely honest with you about our fight to keep the Senate.
**Republican operatives on the ground in Georgia are on HIGH alert. Here 's why:**
* Biden, Obama, Bernie, AOC, Hollywood celebrities, Broadway casts, and many more are campaigning for the Democrats - this is in addition to Biden's planned visit and his megadonors joining the fight.
* Californians are being deployed to turn this battleground blue! They're knocking on doors, registering voters, and some are even trying to cast votes.
* Democrats are pouring in tens of millions into flipping the Senate. EVERY. WEEK

[_**The Left is mobilized and determined, Friend! Can I count on you to rush an immediate 6X-MATCHED donation to help us fight back?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aI2YJKjLTHbSnfSzGTlj1OP9lMcPChp-DiSuU7w9yQIJ9I2-AVvAGfEgfdzx4obabMkQLDH-cDl5u6OgMSTAZEUvfUYiBqyuH-IZ-aYpTSqp5Ln7iut7d4XiFKSUoNwJq16EbptsiUi7I_T5Sua4sLW5Fqclb8i1zbc1wgRcdVz6T1S-ETYJk4x9ZGF3Pr1yDrMdq9Y_LrUXu-gufSzYS8WNLjvtN3Ldp-w7RgsUjAwBGFopjKafykcNqrfqJQ2hKA-ac2e002iCQvIspOyJduFDCvv61caCS-bmmc1ED3PBWjiQHigUjYxA2igxzSLD5TGrCducRa-jNLLBi7lsuVPwIZb4Dwj6Wx4NsgZpG7yWv-ED3RZ1Y-1iHgSzQ3imX9y661j75HGrHNBKtBkZEaeNu5hIFrybBw0RITWtPtU=&c=Atx4Pp3a7806HeuyTwGrQfIdrxzOH7Ho1hoRr4AKfuIGoaKsproxhQ==&ch=rK54mMUvfmTQAu7QG8edRM4X9NgV2KenSp38P1ke6_4pxdgyJG-JmA==)
With less than 3 weeks until the runoffs, losing ANY ground will have dire consequences. Meeting this essential goal gives our Republican candidates the competitive edge they need to win.
**The future of our country is on your shoulders.[Can I count on you to step up right now?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aI2YJKjLTHbSnfSzGTlj1OP9lMcPChp-DiSuU7w9yQIJ9I2-AVvAGfEgfdzx4obabMkQLDH-cDl5u6OgMSTAZEUvfUYiBqyuH-IZ-aYpTSqp5Ln7iut7d4XiFKSUoNwJq16EbptsiUi7I_T5Sua4sLW5Fqclb8i1zbc1wgRcdVz6T1S-ETYJk4x9ZGF3Pr1yDrMdq9Y_LrUXu-gufSzYS8WNLjvtN3Ldp-w7RgsUjAwBGFopjKafykcNqrfqJQ2hKA-ac2e002iCQvIspOyJduFDCvv61caCS-bmmc1ED3PBWjiQHigUjYxA2igxzSLD5TGrCducRa-jNLLBi7lsuVPwIZb4Dwj6Wx4NsgZpG7yWv-ED3RZ1Y-1iHgSzQ3imX9y661j75HGrHNBKtBkZEaeNu5hIFrybBw0RITWtPtU=&c=Atx4Pp3a7806HeuyTwGrQfIdrxzOH7Ho1hoRr4AKfuIGoaKsproxhQ==&ch=rK54mMUvfmTQAu7QG8edRM4X9NgV2KenSp38P1ke6_4pxdgyJG-JmA==)**
[**EMERGENCY 6X-MATCH**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aI2YJKjLTHbSnfSzGTlj1OP9lMcPChp-DiSuU7w9yQIJ9I2-AVvAGfEgfdzx4obabMkQLDH-cDl5u6OgMSTAZEUvfUYiBqyuH-IZ-aYpTSqp5Ln7iut7d4XiFKSUoNwJq16EbptsiUi7I_T5Sua4sLW5Fqclb8i1zbc1wgRcdVz6T1S-ETYJk4x9ZGF3Pr1yDrMdq9Y_LrUXu-gufSzYS8WNLjvtN3Ldp-w7RgsUjAwBGFopjKafykcNqrfqJQ2hKA-ac2e002iCQvIspOyJduFDCvv61caCS-bmmc1ED3PBWjiQHigUjYxA2igxzSLD5TGrCducRa-jNLLBi7lsuVPwIZb4Dwj6Wx4NsgZpG7yWv-ED3RZ1Y-1iHgSzQ3imX9y661j75HGrHNBKtBkZEaeNu5hIFrybBw0RITWtPtU=&c=Atx4Pp3a7806HeuyTwGrQfIdrxzOH7Ho1hoRr4AKfuIGoaKsproxhQ==&ch=rK54mMUvfmTQAu7QG8edRM4X9NgV2KenSp38P1ke6_4pxdgyJG-JmA==)
Packing the Supreme Court, defunding the police, and the most liberal agenda in American history will ONLY happen if we lose control of the Senate. We're depending on grassroots conservatives like you to help make sure this doesn't happen, Friend!
With just days until the deadline, your support could be the difference in reaching this critical benchmark.[**Chip in any amount before midnight tonight for your gift to go 6x as far >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aI2YJKjLTHbSnfSzGTlj1OP9lMcPChp-DiSuU7w9yQIJ9I2-AVvAGfEgfdzx4obabMkQLDH-cDl5u6OgMSTAZEUvfUYiBqyuH-IZ-aYpTSqp5Ln7iut7d4XiFKSUoNwJq16EbptsiUi7I_T5Sua4sLW5Fqclb8i1zbc1wgRcdVz6T1S-ETYJk4x9ZGF3Pr1yDrMdq9Y_LrUXu-gufSzYS8WNLjvtN3Ldp-w7RgsUjAwBGFopjKafykcNqrfqJQ2hKA-ac2e002iCQvIspOyJduFDCvv61caCS-bmmc1ED3PBWjiQHigUjYxA2igxzSLD5TGrCducRa-jNLLBi7lsuVPwIZb4Dwj6Wx4NsgZpG7yWv-ED3RZ1Y-1iHgSzQ3imX9y661j75HGrHNBKtBkZEaeNu5hIFrybBw0RITWtPtU=&c=Atx4Pp3a7806HeuyTwGrQfIdrxzOH7Ho1hoRr4AKfuIGoaKsproxhQ==&ch=rK54mMUvfmTQAu7QG8edRM4X9NgV2KenSp38P1ke6_4pxdgyJG-JmA==)

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Are you sitting this one out, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Senate
body:

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013c8TXTA_KZzjc_QsU9JcueqnilWY7MI_c_IgxAohGMtNFTEzwE6lLgM65W61uMH-cQ4k6p_K-3_vjxf3hhwkO3K77dX6bsMvGwTMoN4Al58AO14b6uS3Do1i3dMiD8SVi0B62X65rxo=&c=8VJyK4SeoMxHb_yiPdYIXdGdcart4B92-WxUUNAfU6MSnYS6L-qdZg==&ch=tQ4hj6a0PmCaW5BXIg48VbSEJuC2BhnRlQdXp5SGKIm6dQFxMn8OMQ==).

**Friend, do you have a Christmas wish?**

[**Can you chip in $7 right now to defend this seat from the Far Left?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FUngNOEn-fr2sUYy2k65IHn_VJn9-IE4SJTZlrdGYGfbPadsHCyGeN3tPI_OBi4llJgX6fqQeBWSQh0mpba_59rMV1IL82NeTgeEtpgE0pY1XsfpfGGEZHDal1kVllsjuOUWW0VJGgX3kDJpxhnbp13rmqWAwsxFmcYxAmCp5I4qFSd8EW1aOYDrxi-4xufXbakVsougRDDmuFP63XjGSz5_iV7LExA1RV161Fr2FqnbDVDjAyzkI0fZdWup2UPHq9OTIhHcDbcH5MlIx5h9BpcyW58c4Rc4CAvmNKOvUY8Gz5RKZGPhvu4hes0L2HCNXqrI7lyRgMyweHKqLqptUvH0CiE57TfoMrP7X9y5QDBiD3xJybDBHYQb98FwT2DISHYVNlVIKp_Xb5W8Ni_b1bi6fI3laFFP&c=ALHW_1n0gBJtLfhU1iWTLm2wOryAx53RrvUAP5yY5kBarxAdOsBvbQ==&ch=Nsb_PCwC_AImU-UOeX3caVhkjT4dMOkD0HNOVGtUah0_smjpbDQwXQ==)

My accent is part of my story and I'm proud of it. I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn't have the resources to fight.

I have returned over $400 million to taxpayers, fought against higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. With a record of results, I will continue to fight for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet.

[**But I can 't do it alone.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FUngNOEn-fr2sUYy2k65IHn_VJn9-IE4SJTZlrdGYGfbPadsHCyGeFPQYuwm8zBJMH6TPG1-x2Hvgk9-LnBUfFmlMVJ0UcjwhyO4--m6rbtKIiDEgim_T0-clgE3paBEwATOZpA9xxh2grWZ3rGqwB7uOwpmE1y5YtqRLgOzE_qgTFL1EBz9f5Mxyqcb7S2JKHeiUWDO7fh-vuU_xrBYMMMQ2fqJvenSvp0pT5L02G9eU0OcfPQsmsm36emoqH1T32wwuRGcr3Seu6EKLZD-RPV6W39LpAti4IymzDVCvlzm_tcAPHL2VLNxYYXSr_Ii4-27nBKWCyEnyiQA9oTNqzaTJgCNNFmrHv1qonBX-fcsM-SIFKovYq6kZnizWfqJNOr450wNTgjM1XjNHQSKlg==&c=ALHW_1n0gBJtLfhU1iWTLm2wOryAx53RrvUAP5yY5kBarxAdOsBvbQ==&ch=Nsb_PCwC_AImU-UOeX3caVhkjT4dMOkD0HNOVGtUah0_smjpbDQwXQ==) Once again, we're facing one of the toughest, closest races in the nation, but with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, I know we can win again.

clean_body: We're in the fight of our lives. Our Far Left opponent -- the very one we defeated only weeks ago -- declared a rematch. . == Friend, we're in the fight of our lives. Our Far Left opponent -- the very one we defeated only weeks ago -- declared a rematch. == The future of the House Majority hinges on whether or not we win because this seat -- a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED -- is a top-target. == They spent $11,000,000.00 to defeat us -- spending more dark money against us than any other race in the nation! -- and outspent us 3:1. With the stakes higher than ever, they'll line up millions more to attack us. == My accent is part of my story and I'm proud of it. I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn't have the resources to fight. I have returned over $400 million to taxpayers, fought against higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. With a record of results, I will continue to fight for lower taxes so all Americans can keep more of their hard-earned dollars in their wallet. == Once again, we're facing one of the toughest, closest races in the nation, but with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, I know we can win again. Thank you, Michelle Steel == | Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

We’re running out of time to make sure that Democrats Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock pull ahead in their races, so today we’re setting up a goal of building a $10,000 Georgia Fund. _**And we need your help.**_ **[Will you make a contribution today to help us get started on our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/22817190/265649562/91212128?refcode=email_20201219_SA_GA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjRmMmM2ZC0wOTQzLWViMTEtYTYwNy0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6e2KwvYGJOi6cKkvJ6-_mF9UfAr28Rv0aPUyFI6fDfU=) Our team has set a deadline of hitting our goal before midnight on December 23rd. ** Election Day is January 5th—which is less than three weeks away. But in the midst of a pandemic, many Georgians are voting early to avoid long lines and crowded polling locations on Election Day. That means that “Election Day” is a bit of a misnomer—it’s more of an Election Month. We all know the stakes couldn’t be higher. We also know that we’ve asked a lot of you this year, and we’re all tired from a very intense election cycle. But, friend, now is the time to dig deep and make sure we’re all doing everything we can to help Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock. If we fail to flip the Senate on January 5th, we’re not going to get another shot until November 2022. For so many Americans who are depending on the incoming Biden administration to rebuild our economy and fight COVID-19, that’s too long to wait. [**Please rush a contribution today to help us build our $10,000 Georgia Fund and make sure Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock pull ahead in their critical Senate name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Protect Your Household, First Vaccines, and Christmas
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It's more important than ever that we all stay informed. Please, stay socially distanced, wash your hands, and wear a mask anytime you're with people you don't live with. Together, we can keep our COVID-19 case numbers trending in the right direction.
If you know someone who needs a way to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, please encourage them to sign up for these emails through this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UEogOWP4IebAFrn2Kom5kmuuF_2xP8hIHvorykwkfsffTM_RwXGM_lwPEAJrWQA4RxZ3hxxv_KrXWTZqKoUnhmgHhYQpfWmyrRsZMUw84pboY3XWFtxFUg2G9lw6WX24UnU1_wKenQv2qTG-YahALcJgXids-XELTRiHR8A4maBHjUbuoPpq_2_K-HGfLDQI32QHM8homVZuUTwoczy7FBbhnwcr8a_i_KSIySKWi0ddh7zCrU797oj6die1VVngAhYdnW3sEzroI3N15IfcaGQpiMGxHUl8rv15USVFjBHMfd0vnUdGQR4W-WnNxRHimIDYjDTKZ7U=&c=RYdmPCgKCRCAlDqZqBvuR7daWCx3SNpMkzHL7GWePws47mIZIH48wg==&ch=WR4Nty4i0mK6M-Pi4HKs3Bqb3IG_9uHjSN31ni4xyPXyHgNKCwOMfw==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
PROTECT YOUR HOUSEHOLD
After a couple months of our numbers ticking up week after week, we're finally seeing our COVID-19 numbers turn around and start heading in the right direction. We know from not just mobility data, but also enforcement data and case investigations, that people took the pause seriously. Our R-value, or rate of spread, has been steadily decreasing since the pause, and is now right around 1, which is great news. I'm pleased that the three-week pause moved us in the right direction.

Our pause ends today as planned, and the [new guidance](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UEogOWP4IebAFrn2Kom5kmuuF_2xP8hIHvorykwkfsffTM_RwXGM_rtZCN-EJYdJE2XIxfg6-CUDxqiA3TUgclAke6qsnRElg6TXI0EGxdZ7LeH-BIJ74U-sanVdXCCWRiHhl_o8oWZjxm8ykNDpyw==&c=RYdmPCgKCRCAlDqZqBvuR7daWCx3SNpMkzHL7GWePws47mIZIH48wg==&ch=WR4Nty4i0mK6M-Pi4HKs3Bqb3IG_9uHjSN31ni4xyPXyHgNKCwOMfw==) we announced last week will take effect tomorrow, Monday, December 21. This will only work if we all take the dial-up just as seriously as we took the pause, and that means staying with your household. That's the key - it's all about protecting your household over the next few weeks. If we all think about what we can do in our own lives to protect those we live with this holiday season, we'll keep our loved ones safe.
| | |
---|---
|
FIRST VACCINES

This week was a turning point for Rhode Island and for our country in the fight against COVID-19. On Monday, December 14, the state's first COVID-19 vaccine was administered to our state's healthcare workers. As of Friday, we had administered over 1,200 doses of the vaccine. We still have a long way to go, but this is a historic step toward defeating COVID-19. You can read more about the vaccine, including our distribution plan, at [health.ri.gov/covid/vaccine](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UEogOWP4IebAFrn2Kom5kmuuF_2xP8hIHvorykwkfsffTM_RwXGM_hHNrhAVB3bdQiTohtAZyuj-jHOvIzmXivKMERz1CQfpeMXVFP_-drtIYit1IJhXcCrQcxzlP2WaBx1BkI1WrBcjOFI-gHi6VwR7IUEHWEl3&c=RYdmPCgKCRCAlDqZqBvuR7daWCx3SNpMkzHL7GWePws47mIZIH48wg==&ch=WR4Nty4i0mK6M-Pi4HKs3Bqb3IG_9uHjSN31ni4xyPXyHgNKCwOMfw==).

On Thursday, Dr. Philip Chan and Tricia Washburn of the Rhode Island Department of Health (RIDOH) hosted a Facebook Live to answer questions that Rhode Islanders have sent us about the vaccine. You can watch that video by clicking [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UEogOWP4IebAFrn2Kom5kmuuF_2xP8hIHvorykwkfsffTM_RwXGM_n-C6CU-uSbLDXkYRAswpb-FQqmZG7dhly3vqYSsuyfEueqkpHqZmGi_qVFGbcKDaetE5kCnQsIIkIk2vN0jtnP6zP-FrSieOw0eci2QVzP9DGYzMXVUm7XvFu7wxRWaaeg9rryprcA64UiX75thoWY=&c=RYdmPCgKCRCAlDqZqBvuR7daWCx3SNpMkzHL7GWePws47mIZIH48wg==&ch=WR4Nty4i0mK6M-Pi4HKs3Bqb3IG_9uHjSN31ni4xyPXyHgNKCwOMfw==).
| | |
---|---
|
CHRISTMAS

As you think about how you're celebrating Christmas this year, please celebrate only with the people you live with. We're asking you to plan for Christmas the same way you did for Thanksgiving. Organize a Zoom with your loved ones. Call your friends and family. Unwrap gifts or have dinner together virtually. But please protect your household, and that means don't gather with people you don't live with. Don't travel to see people, don't host people at your house, and don't get together with friends or family who aren't the people you live with.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. Please, remember your three W's: wear a mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance. Together, we can prevent the spread of COVID-19 and protect your household if we just band together now and follow the rules.
I'll be back on TV with more updates this Tuesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UEogOWP4IebAFrn2Kom5kmuuF_2xP8hIHvorykwkfsffTM_RwXGM_lwPEAJrWQA4BBPV-IpTGZ3C2Awfq3duXxsjlieWpAzcfwApm5M8D_uSCyzYVwlW8tvIcKdPEi_G9TF29ymV6w02kKenpjSmcgnHD6k7rA4iBiT7-0z2o46IklLXyHfjO9UtgMg8MFg8UTRlGuruLwR9sQwIKhMKtYn5xG-2wgrT3lbHlE7xPgux7UAUdj5P2rE00JgSQXi1D8MBt3tzgKcM-GrJlre6-bOQmYM5FU1oPqGagaWIW12OZjU5hNgq6CeXNNV15k-eaGJ4u5rtcPM=&c=RYdmPCgKCRCAlDqZqBvuR7daWCx3SNpMkzHL7GWePws47mIZIH48wg==&ch=WR4Nty4i0mK6M-Pi4HKs3Bqb3IG_9uHjSN31ni4xyPXyHgNKCwOMfw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
